# Wiki Link Test

This file tests Obsidian-style wiki links.

## Basic Links

- Simple link: [[hello]]
- With extension: [[hello.md]]
- Nested file: [[subdir/nested]]

## Display Text

- Custom display: [[hello|Hello World]]
- Different text: [[example|Example File]]

## Heading Links

- With heading: [[hello#code-block]]
- Heading and display: [[hello#table|Jump to Table]]

## Broken Links

- Non-existent: [[does-not-exist]]
- Also missing: [[missing|Missing File]]
